items.title: OpenThoughts-Agent: Data Recipes for Agentic Models

items.title: World Models in Pieces: Structural Certification for General Agents
items.summary: In the big-world regime, agents cannot be universally capable and their ability is inevitably specialized across a world model in pieces. items.title: Matching Tasks to Objectives: Fine-Tuning and Prompt-Tuning Strategies for Encoder-Decoder Pre-trained Language Models

items.title: Grading the Grader: Lessons from Evaluating an Agentic Data Analysis System
items.summary: Agentic data analysis systems produce rich outputs, including code, numerical results, and verbal diagnostics. items.title: Difference-Making without Making a Difference

items.title: Solving Inverse Problems of Chaotic Systems with Bidirectional Conditional Flow Matching
items.summary: Modeling chaotic systems is crucial yet challenging. Inverse problems in chaotic dynamics, namely inferring initial conditions from final states, remain largely unsolved because of ill-posedness, non-uniqueness, instability, and potentially chaotic time-reverse dynamics. items.title: Large-Language-Model Discovery of Quantum LDPC Codes through Structured Concept Evolution

items.title: EG-VQA: Benchmarking Verifiable Video Question Answering with Grounded Temporal Evidence

items.title: Grad Detect: Gradient-Based Hallucination Detection in LLMs

items.title: Paying to Know: Micro-Transaction Markets for Verified Product Information in Agentic E-Commerce
items.summary: Commercial NLP treats the shopping chatbot as a recommender or a conversion tool: its job is to match a user to a catalogue entry and close a sale. items.title: Assessing Distribution Shift in Human Activity Recognition for Domain Generalization

items.title: New Bounds for the Last Iterate of the Stochastic subGradient Method
